matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Public Policy is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The MPhil in Public Policy provides an interdisciplinary grounding in public policy theory and practice, with courses spanning from economics and statistics to policy debates and professional skills.
